seo_title.description: The SEO title of the article

description.description: The SEO description of the article

allow_comments.description: Enable or disable the commenting on the article. **true** - Commenting will be enabled; **false** - Commenting will be disabled

show_table_of_contents.description: Enable or disable the Table of Contents (TOC) for the article in the knowledge base. **true** - TOC will be enabled; **false** - TOC will be disabled

allOf.description: Article status in the knowledge base. 0 - None; 1 - New; 2 - Updated; 3 - Custom
allOf.title: ArticleStatusIndicator

status_indicator.description: Article status in the knowledge base. 0 - None; 1 - New; 2 - Updated; 3 - Custom

status_indicator_expiry_date.description: The date-time when the public article status is removed

exclude_from_search.description: **true** - The article will not appear in search results in the knowledge base; **false** - The article will appear in search results in the knowledge base

exclude_from_ai_search.description: **true** - The Eddy-AI assistant will not fetch information from this article; **false** - The Eddy-AI assistant will not exclude this article while fetching information

related_articles.description: The list of related article IDs to show in the knowledge base

exclude_from_external_search.description: Set this to true to prevent the page from being indexed by external search engines. Document360 will automatically add a robots meta tag and exclude the page from the sitemap it generates.

field_id.description: The ID of the custom field definition

value.description:
The value to set for the custom field. Type depends on field type:
- Text/TextArea: string
- Number: int or double
- Boolean: bool
- Date: DateTime (ISO 8601 format)
- Dropdown: string (option ID)
- MultiSelectDropdown: List<string> (array of option IDs)

items.description: Request model for updating a custom field value
items.title: CustomFieldValueRequest

custom_fields.description: Custom field values to update. Only provided fields will be updated (partial update supported).

Article settings update request..summary: This request is used to update the article settings. Kindly make sure the changes for updating your parameters has done successfully.

value.description: This is the description for updating article settings.
